artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a severed rabbit's foot charm bound in tarnished gold chain, dangling against deep smoky black, its matted fur catching a single hot-gold firelight, a faint sickly aura pulsing around it. Scattered dice and a strung carnival bulb blur in the shadowed depths behind. The wide frame centers the talisman, embers drifting past, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Lucky Rabbit's Foot (Unlucky for the Rabbit)
text:
Whenever equipped creature is dealt damage, roll a six-sided die. On a 6, prevent that damage. The foot's luck eventually runs out, but it's not your foot, so who cares.
Equip {1}
flavorText: It worked great for everyone except the previous owner.
